title: Infosys obtains SEC exemptive relief for proposed ₹ 18,000 Crore buyback
detailed_summary: Infosys Limited stated that it obtained requested exemptive relief from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission by a letter dated September 11, 2025 for its proposed buyback. The buyback proposal, approved by the Board on September 11, 2025, covers up to 10,00,00,000 fully paid-up equity shares of face value ₹ 5/ - each for an amount aggregating up to ₹ 18,000 Crore. The relief relates to certain tender offer procedures because of conflicting Indian and U.S. regulatory requirements. The buyback remains subject to shareholder approval by special resolution through postal ballot, and the record date and public announcement details will be determined or released later.

key_facts.fact: Infosys obtained requested exemptive relief from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission by a letter dated September 11, 2025.
key_facts.section_heading: Sub:   Exemptive relief granted by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission dated September 11, 2025 for the Buyback

key_facts.fact: The Board of Directors approved a proposal to buy back up to 10,00,00,000 fully paidup equity shares of face value of ₹ 5/ - each.
key_facts.section_heading: Sub:   Exemptive relief granted by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission dated September 11, 2025 for the Buyback

key_facts.fact: The proposed buyback amount aggregates up to ₹ 18,000 Crore (Rupees Eighteen Thousand Crore only).
key_facts.section_heading: Sub:   Exemptive relief granted by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission dated September 11, 2025 for the Buyback

key_facts.fact: The SEC exemptive relief was sought on certain aspects of tender offer procedures due to conflicting regulatory requirements between Indian and U.S. laws for tender offer buybacks.
key_facts.section_heading: Sub:   Exemptive relief granted by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission dated September 11, 2025 for the Buyback

key_facts.fact: The buyback is subject to approval of shareholders by special resolution through postal ballot.
key_facts.section_heading: Sub:   Exemptive relief granted by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission dated September 11, 2025 for the Buyback

key_facts.fact: The record date for the buyback will be determined in due course.

processing_notes: The SEC relief is treated as supporting context for the buyback rather than a separate litigation_or_regulatory_matters item because the document describes exemptive relief for a corporate action, not an investigation, penalty, dispute, or enforcement matter.
